com.github.dakusui.pcond.provider

Interface AssertionProvider<AE extends Throwable>

  • Type Parameters:
    AE - The type of exception that should be thrown on an application error.
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    AssertionProviderBase<AE>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    DefaultAssertionProvider

    public interface AssertionProvider<AE extends Throwable>

    An interface of a policy for behaviours on 'contract violations'.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static AssertionProvider<?> INSTANCE
      A constant field that holds the default provider instance.

    • Field Detail

      • INSTANCE

        static final AssertionProvider<?> INSTANCE

        A constant field that holds the default provider instance.

    • Method Detail

      • createAssertionProvider

        static AssertionProvider<?> createAssertionProvider(Properties properties)

        Returns a provider instance created from a given Properties object. This method reads the value for the FQCN of this class (com.github.dakusui.pcond.provider.AssertionProvider) and creates an instance of a class specified by the value. If the value is not set, this value instantiates an object of DefaultAssertionProvider and returns it.

        Parameters:
        properties - A Properties object from which an AssertionProvider is created
        Returns:
        Created provider instance.

      • requireNonNull

        <T> T requireNonNull(T value)

        Checks a value if it is null or not. If it is not a null, this method returns the given value itself.

        Type Parameters:
        T - The type of the value.
        Parameters:
        value - The given value.
        Returns:
        The value.

      • requireArgument

        <T> T requireArgument(T value,
                      Predicate<? super T> cond)

        Checks a value if it meets a requirement specified by cond. If it does, the value itself will be returned.

        Type Parameters:
        T - The type of the value.
        Parameters:
        value - The value to be checked.
        cond - The requirement to check the value.
        Returns:
        The value.

      • requireState

        <T> T requireState(T value,
                   Predicate<? super T> cond)

        Checks a value if it meets a requirement specified by cond. If it does, the value itself will be returned.

        Type Parameters:
        T - The type of the value.
        Parameters:
        value - The value to be checked.
        cond - The requirement to check the value.
        Returns:
        The value.
